code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut ok = true
while i < n / 2
  let a = string.byte_at(line, i)
  let b = string.byte_at(line, n - 1 - i)
  match a
  when Some(av)
    match b
    when Some(bv)
      if av != bv
        ok = false
      end
    when None
      ok = false
    end
  when None
    ok = false
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if ok
  println("YES")
else
  println("NO")
end
